actionsTaken: Created component with HTML5 video API, custom controls (Play/Pause, Seek ±10s, Speed Control), and responsive UI using Tailwind and Motion.
logs: Component created successfully. playbackRate fallback handled with console.warn as per requirement.

actionsTaken: Created detail card with muscle tags, collapsible mistakes section, and action buttons.
logs: Responsive design applied. Motion used for collapsible section.

actionsTaken: Implemented timer with round/rest logic, visual feedback, and Web Audio beep fallback.
logs: audio:beep-fallback implemented. Timer logic verified for multiple rounds.

actionsTaken: Integrated VideoPlayer, DetailCard, and BoxingTimer into a state-driven workout flow with preparation countdown and summary screen.
logs: Flow logic verified (idle -> preparing -> active -> finished). Auto-advance on timer completion works.

actionsTaken: Implemented saveWorkoutHistory with Firestore addDoc and localStorage fallback.
logs: Firestore write logic verified. LocalStorage fallback tested by simulating offline error.

actionsTaken: Implemented CacheManager with Cache API and LRU strategy. Integrated into ExerciseVideoPlayer.
logs: Cache hit logic verified. Background caching works. Offline error UI tested.

actionsTaken: Implemented dashboard with stats, recent activity, and training calendar. Integrated with Firestore.
logs: Data fetching and aggregation verified. Calendar rendering works.

actionsTaken: Implemented streak calculator and achievement unlock logic. Integrated into workout flow.
logs: Streak logic verified with edge cases (today/yesterday). Achievement unlocking works on workout completion.

actionsTaken: Implemented dynamic routine generation based on goal, level, and time.
logs: Filtering and time-based selection logic verified.
